items.headline: King Clancy 2026 nominee essay Toronto Maple Leafs John Tavares
items.description: Editor’s Note: The King Clancy Memorial Trophy is presented annually to the NHL player who best exemplifies leadership qualities on and off the ice and has made a noteworthy humanitarian contribution in his community. Each NHL Club nominates a player to be considered for this recognition, and each nominee has

items.headline: Mark Jankowski signs 2 year contract with Carolina Hurricanes
items.description:
Mark Jankowski signed a two-year, $3.7 million contract with the Carolina Hurricanes on Monday. It has an average annual value of $1.85 million,
The 31-year-old forward had 21 points (11 goals, 10 assists) in 68 regular-season games this season. He has one assist in eight Stanley Cup Playoff games for

items.headline: Anaheim Ducks lineup changes pay off in Game 4 win
items.description: ANAHEIM -- The Anaheim Ducks return to Las Vegas for Game 5 of the Western Conference Second Round against the Vegas Golden Knights at T-Mobile Arena on Tuesday (9:30 p.m. ET; ESPN, SN360, SN, TVAS) after three lineup changes helped them even the best-of-7 series with a 4-3 victory at

items.headline: Vote NHL Goal Of Year Prizes Free Cruise
items.description:
Thanks to some incredible NHL goals from this past regular season, you could be the one to score.

items.headline: NHL Stanley Pup rescue dog competition returns for 3rd year
items.description: NEW YORK -- The National Hockey League (NHL) today announced that Stanley Pup is back for its third consecutive year, bringing a dose of puppy power to the postseason. items.description:

items.headline: Stanley Cup Playoffs Playback for May 11, 2026
items.description: The Stanley Cup Playoffs are in full swing and NHL.com has it all covered. Each day, we will present Stanley Cup Playoffs Playback, your one-stop shop for all the action. Here’s a look at where things stand on Monday, May 11:

items.headline: Beckett Sennecke energizes Ducks during Game 4 win
items.description:

items.headline: Golden Knights fail to step up in Mark Stone's absence
items.description: ANAHEIM -- On a more inexperienced team than the Vegas Golden Knights, losing a captain and the franchise's all-time leader in playoff scoring might be a bigger concern.

items.headline: Vegas Golden Knights Anaheim Ducks game 4 recap May 10 2026
items.description: ANAHEIM -- Cutter Gauthier had three assists for the Anaheim Ducks in a 4-3 win against the Vegas Golden Knights in Game 4 of the Western Conference Second Round at Honda Center on Sunday.

items.headline: Cole Caufield shines for Canadiens in front of Australian fans
items.description:
MONTREAL -- Cole Caufield needed something, anything, to change his fortunes and get out of his postseason scoring funk.
Who knew it would come from halfway around the world?

items.headline: Buffalo Sabres too emotional in Game 3 loss to Montreal Canadiens
items.description: MONTREAL – Hours before puck drop between the Buffalo Sabres and Montreal Canadiens on Sunday, Lindy Ruff contemplated the insanity the team was anticipating from the Bell Centre crowd, the volume and intensity and emotion. items.headline: Montreal Canadiens Jakub Dobes continues quick rise during playoffs
items.description: MONTREAL -- Jakub Dobes fought back the tears as he pointed to his heart, then up to the crowd that was chanting his name.

items.headline: 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs second round schedule television results
items.description: The second round of the 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs began Saturday with the Carolina Hurricanes defeating the Philadelphia Flyers 3-0. The second round continued on Sunday with the Colorado Avalanche defeating the Minnesota Wild 9-6.
